chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-153 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of MA 1517/24 21-02-2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press the instant Crl. Misc. Application and states that the applicant intends to exhaust remedy before the trial Court by filing application under section 265-K or 249-A CrPC, as the case may be, for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
